content: Liquid Glass (macOS Tahoe 26, 2025-2026): translucent material that reflects/refracts surroundings, tint shifts with wallpaper warmth, dynamically transforms to focus content. Shares Dynamic Island philosophy: responsiveness, fluidity, depth; works best for glanceable UI (controls, banners, now-playing). Micro-interactions rendered in Core Animation, ~12ms added latency (imperceptible). Cross-platform design harmony iOS/macOS/watchOS. Caveat (TidBITS): over-glassing hurts legibility; users invoke Reduce Transparency — accessibility fallback needed.
